productName: Mellow Prerolls, 2 x .5g, Full Flower Rosin Infused - OG Kush, Hybrid
description: Ready-to-spark hybrid infused pre-roll of OG Kush, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of woody, pine, and earthy, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
